pr.title: Record: Int6 + MLP 3x + NorMuon + SmearGate + BigramHash + OrthoInit + Sliding Window, val_bpb=1.1541

output.summary: Int6 quantization funds a 3x MLP NorMuon stack with SmearGate, BigramHash token-pair features, and sliding-window evaluation.
techniques: Int6 per-row quantization frees room for 3x MLP expansion
SmearGate plus BigramHash token-pair conditioning before the transformer
NorMuon with decoupled weight decay and orthogonal muP init
